title: Step 1
text: When the security operations room receives a report of a chemical spill or a hazardous material leak, it must rapidly verify the source of the report and the exact incident location.

title: Step 2
text: Announce Code Orange through the internal overhead speaker system and repeat the announcement several times, while also sending a signal through wireless communication devices to the security teams assigned for emergency response.

title: Step 3
text: Communicate directly with Civil Defense and the Hazmat Response Team in the facility regarding the incident.

title: Step 4
text: Alert security personnel to avoid direct exposure to toxic emissions or dangerous substances and avoid remaining for long periods in the affected area, while rotating with other security staff when securing the site.

title: Step 5
text: The nearest security staff must move to the incident after taking the minimum necessary protective measures required for response, including the use of personal protective equipment.

title: Step 6
text: Establish a safety perimeter around the affected zone at an adequate distance and guide staff and nearby persons toward the nearest emergency exit.

title: Step 7
text: Facilitate access for specialists to the incident site after ensuring that they are wearing the designated clothing and protective equipment for chemical spill response.

title: Step 8
text: Comply with all directions and operational instructions issued by incident command and relevant authorities inside the facility.

title: Step 9
text: Permit activity to resume in the affected area only after the recovery phase has been completed, decontamination and site ventilation have been carried out, and approval has been obtained from Civil Defense and the relevant authorities in the facility.

title: Step 10
text: Prepare and submit a joint incident report with the relevant specialists in the facility and Civil Defense to facility leadership.

title: Step 11
text: Provide the National Center for Emergency and Health Crisis Management with all required information related to the incident.
